subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The work penned by the true friend hath been perused. The ocean of bounties surgeth, and its waves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی اثر خامه دوست حقیقی ملاحظه گردید بحر الطاف پر موج و آن موج رو
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God
